mapper.sql: select asset_id as assetId, asset_code as assetCode, asset_name as assetName, business_domain as businessDomain, asset_type as assetType, asset_status as assetStatus, security_level as securityLevel, source_system as sourceSystem, data_format as dataFormat, schema_desc as schemaDesc, dictionary_desc as dictionaryDesc, update_frequency as updateFrequency, data_volume as dataVolume, storage_location as storageLocation, share_mode as shareMode, share_condition as shareCondition, owner_dept_name as ownerDeptName, owner_name as ownerName, contact_phone as contactPhone, tag_names as tagNames, lineage_desc as lineageDesc, quality_rule_desc as qualityRuleDesc, create_by as createBy, create_time as createTime, update_by as updateBy, update_time as updateTime, remark from inf_data_asset
mapper.delete:
delete from inf_data_asset where asset_id in
#{assetId}
